title: Habenaria mirabilis
taxonomy: Habenaria mirabilis is a species of orchid. It belongs to the family Orchidaceae. The genus Habenaria is part of the subfamily Orchidoideae. Within the Orchidaceae family, Habenaria mirabilis is further classified into the subtribe Orchidinae. This classification is based on its morphological characteristics and evolutionary relationships with other orchid species.
uses: Habenaria mirabilis has been found to have potential medicinal uses, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy. The plant has been traditionally used in some cultures to treat various health issues, including fever and infections. More studies are required to understand the full potential of Habenaria mirabilis in traditional medicine.
